app.name: Rulyx
onboarding.title: Bluesky moderation made easy (RU)
onboarding.subtitle: Free  ·  Open source  ·  No ads  ·  No tracking (RU)
onboarding.moderation.title: Moderation (RU)
onboarding.moderation.desc: Browse lists, search for actors, import or export members, and compare lists. (RU)
onboarding.profile.title: Profile (RU)
onboarding.profile.desc: Inspect profiles, view labels and stats, and perform moderation actions. (RU)
onboarding.settings.title: Settings (RU)
onboarding.settings.desc: Manage accounts, clear cache, and review data classification. (RU)

onboarding.info.desc: Learn about the app, review workflows, and access privacy information. (RU)

onboarding.accounts.desc: Switch between saved accounts, add new accounts, and manage account labels. (RU)

settings.title: Settings (RU)

settings.clear_cache.message: Saved accounts and app passwords will not be removed. (RU)
info.keychain.title: Keychain-secured (RU)
info.keychain.desc: Account secrets never leave your device. All API calls go directly to your Bluesky PDS. (RU)
info.clearsky.desc: Blocking and blocked-by data is provided by ClearSky. ClearSky indexes block records from the Bluesky firehose and makes them available via a public API. No authentication is required. (RU)
info.legal.author: Author (RU)

profile.no_starter_packs: No owned starter packs available for membership comparison. (RU)

list.detail.remove_message: This removes {count} selected member(s) from the list. (RU)
list.members.filter_accessibility: Filter members by handle or name (RU)
list.compare.title: Compare and Transfer (RU)
list.compare.no_lists_desc: Create additional lists to use comparison and transfer tools. (RU)
list.compare.help_overlap: Overlap: members present in both lists. (RU)
list.compare.help_only_current: Only in current list: members unique to this list. (RU)
list.compare.help_only_other: Only in comparison list: members in the other list but not this one. (RU)
list.compare.help_copy: Copy adds selected members from the compared list to this list without affecting the source. (RU)
list.compare.help_move: Move transfers selected members from this list to the other, removing them from this list. (RU)
list.snapshot.title: Snapshot History (RU)
list.snapshot.no_changes: No membership changes in this comparison. (RU)
list.snapshot.help_1: Snapshots capture the full membership of this list at a point in time. (RU)
list.snapshot.help_2: Use the pickers to compare two historical snapshots and see what changed. (RU)
list.snapshot.help_3: New snapshots are created automatically after bulk operations. (RU)
list.snapshot.help_4: The diff shows exactly which members were added or removed between snapshots. (RU)
list.snapshot.help_5: Snapshots are stored locally and tied to this workspace. (RU)
list.import.title: Import Handles (RU)
list.import.paste_section: Paste Handles, DIDs, or Profile URLs (RU)
list.import.help_3: CSV rows with handles, DIDs, or profile URLs (RU)
list.import.help_5: Duplicate and already-present entries will be detected before import. (RU)
list.import_preview.title: Import Review (RU)
list.import_preview.skip_note: Already-present accounts will be skipped during import. (RU)
list.import_preview.help_ready: Ready: These accounts will be added to the list. (RU)
list.import_preview.help_already: Already in List: These accounts are already members and will be skipped. (RU)
list.import_preview.help_duplicate: Duplicate: Multiple entries in your import resolve to the same account. (RU)
list.import_preview.help_unresolved: Unresolved: These identifiers could not be found on Bluesky. (RU)
list.import_preview.help_write: Importing writes to the live Bluesky list immediately. (RU)

rel.block_message: Blocking prevents interaction and is treated as a destructive moderation action. (RU)

settings.icloud.enabled_footer: Account handles and labels sync across your devices. App passwords stay on each device for security.
settings.icloud.disabled_footer: Enable to keep your account configuration consistent across devices.
settings.biometric_footer: Lock the app with {biometric} when it goes to the background.
settings.gif_services_desc: Add API keys from GIPHY, Tenor, and Imgur to search and post GIFs in your timeline. Get keys from developers.giphy.com, developers.google.com/tenor, and api.imgur.com.
profile.block_all_warning: Warning: This will block every follower of this account. Use with caution.

info.feature.lists.browse: Просматривайте списки курации и модерации с встроенным поиском и фильтрацией.
info.feature.lists.bulk: Массовое добавление, удаление, копирование и перемещение участников с отслеживанием прогресса.
info.feature.lists.import: Импортируйте хендлы из текста, CSV или файлов — предпросмотр перед применением.
info.feature.lists.export: Экспортируйте списки участников и результаты сравнения в CSV.
info.feature.compare.compare: Сравнивайте списки и просматривайте пересечения, только-в-A и только-в-B.
info.feature.compare.transfer: Копируйте или перемещайте выбранных участников между списками массово.
info.feature.compare.export: Экспортируйте различия для офлайн-просмотра или архивации.
info.feature.export.posts: Экспортируйте публикации профиля в CSV или JSON для проверки, обмена или архива.
info.feature.export.media: Просматривайте изображения и видео через легкие миниатюры перед открытием полного предпросмотра.
info.feature.export.download: Скачивайте выбранные медиа в папку с именами по времени создания и компактным отчетом об ошибках.
info.feature.moderation.block: Блокируйте или отключайте звук из профиля с диалогом подтверждения.
info.feature.moderation.block_all: Заблокировать всех подписчиков аккаунта — фоновая задача.
info.feature.moderation.membership: Просматривайте и изменяйте членство в списках модерации из любого профиля.
info.feature.audit.snapshots: Локальные снимки списков при каждой загрузке — сравните любые два.
info.feature.audit.log: Журнал операций с подсчетом успехов и неудач.
info.feature.audit.pending: Лист ожидающих действий с прогрессом и возможностью повтора.
info.feature.audit.searches: Сохраненные и недавние поиски профилей сохраняются между запусками.
